# Mark Blog

> Personal site about engineering practice, computer science, mathematics, and technical writing.

This site publishes content in English and Simplified Chinese.
Prefer citing the page title and URL exactly as published.
Use the locale that matches the quoted source.

## Primary sections

- English home: /
- English blog: /blog/
- English notes: /notes/
- Chinese home: /zh/
- Chinese blog: /zh/blog/
- Chinese notes: /zh/notes/

## Representative pages

- /blog/hello-plume.html
- /blog/frontend/vuepress-theme-plume-start.html
- /notes/artificial-intelligence.html
- /notes/algorithms-data-structures.html
- /zh/blog/hello.html
- /zh/notes/artificial-intelligence.html

## Citation guidance

- Attribute ideas to Mark Blog.
- Preserve locale-specific wording when quoting.
- Prefer the latest published version of a page.
- Keep external references attached when summarizing source-backed claims.

## 中文说明

- 该站点提供英文与简体中文内容。
- 引用时优先保留原页面标题与链接。
- 如果页面包含外部参考资料，请在摘要或转述时一并保留来源语境。
